calendar.matters:
UD COURT TRIALS
Off Calendar Nov-13-2017 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-13-2017 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned by Dept. 501 for Prove-Up Hearing.
Judge: Gail Dekreon, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Steve Naumchik, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Trinity Management Services.
Jackie Lopez, Corporate Manager for plaintiff Trinity Management Services, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendants Stephen Merchant or Jeffrey Yordy, a/k/a Jeff Yordy.
Defendants filed their answer to plaintiff's complaint on October 20, 2017.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, November 13, 2017.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed & served on October 26, 2017.

Exhibit 1: Residential Rental Agreement dated April 21, 2017..........................ID/EVID
Exhibit 2: Three-Day Notice to Pay Rent or Quit dated October 6, 2017.................ID/EVID

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Trinity Management Services, and against defendants Stephen Merchant or Jeffrey Yordy, a/k/a Jeff Yordy, as follows:

Past-Due Rent - $17,225.80.
Costs - $335.00.

Total - $17,560.80.

Plaintiff is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the property located at 1890 Clay Street, #1107, San Francisco, CA 94109.

The Rental Agreement is canceled and the Lease is forfeited.

Counsel stipulates to the return of the exhibits.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
